title: Software Developer Intern
mainText:

At a glance
$15–20/hr
Remote, based in United States
Work from home
Internship
Part-time
US work authorization required
Open to candidates with OPT/CPT
Job description

We are looking for a Software Developer Intern to support our development team in building and maintaining applications while gaining hands-on experience.

Responsibilities

Assist in developing and testing software applications
Write clean and efficient code
Debug and troubleshoot basic issues
Collaborate with team members on projects

Requirements

Basic knowledge of programming (e.g., JavaScript, Python, or Java)
Familiarity with HTML/CSS and Git is a plus
Strong willingness to learn and problem-solve

About the employer
BiiTech Academy

Information Technology

Follow
1-10 employees

Germantown, MD

At BiiTech Academy, our mission is to empower individuals with the knowledge, skills, and resources necessary to thrive in the ever-evolving field of Information Technology. We are passionate about bridging the gap between education and employment by offering cutting-edge training programs, career development support, and direct placement opportunities.
Through our robust network of industry partnerships and expert-led courses, we prepare students and professionals for high-demand IT roles, equipping them with practical skills and certifications that stand out in the job market.
Whether you're a student seeking to launch your career or an employer looking for top IT talent, BiiTech Academy is your trusted partner in achieving success. Join us as we build the future of the tech workforce!
